reviewed_entities.authority: Rhode Island Department of Elementary and Secondary Education
reviewed_entities.evidence_excerpt: The public LEA detail lists superintendent, business, technology, liaison, and nurse contacts, but no Special Education Director role.
Contact Katie Nerstheimer, Student Services Director, at 401-721-0824, ext. 216 for more information.

reviewed_entities.authority: Rhode Island Department of Elementary and Secondary Education
reviewed_entities.evidence_excerpt: The public LEA detail preserves superintendent, guidance, data, and health roles, but no special-education routing role.

education.blocker_summary: Public Rhode Island education routing is partially reviewable but still not complete: at least one reviewed public LEA, Sheila Skip Nowell Leadership Academy, lacks a direct public special-education routing contact, and no exhaustive public LEA-by-LEA routing artifact is preserved here.

county_local.blocker_summary: Reviewed official BHDDH and DHS public lanes still do not preserve a county-to-office, county-to-provider, municipality-to-office, or service-area routing contract suitable for California-grade local disability routing.
